name: Test Loop
description: Agent-observable test runner for CodeSurf. Detects safe project test profiles, runs them with bounded logs, supports cancel/rerun, and publishes the latest result as context.
author: contex

actions.name: detectProfiles
actions.description: Detect runnable project test/build/typecheck profiles for the active workspace.

actions.name: startRun
actions.description: Start a bounded test loop run for a detected profile. Params: { profileId: string }

actions.name: cancelRun
actions.description: Cancel the active test loop run.

actions.name: getLastRun
actions.description: Return the latest test loop run and bounded output.

mcpTools.name: detect_profiles
mcpTools.description: Detect safe test/build/typecheck profiles for a workspace. Params: { workspacePath: string }

mcpTools.name: start_run
mcpTools.description: Start a bounded run for a detected profile. Params: { workspacePath: string, profileId: string, timeoutMs?: number }

mcpTools.name: get_last_run
mcpTools.description: Return the latest Test Loop run for a workspace. Params: { workspacePath: string }

mcpTools.name: cancel_run
mcpTools.description: Cancel a Test Loop run. Params: { workspacePath?: string, runId?: string }
